name: 2'1"x3'2" Plaid Scatter Woven Accent Rug Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add comfort and style to your floor space with this Plaid Scatter Woven Accent Rug from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This rectangular area rug in a plaid scatter pattern in a brown hue for a neutral look that blends with any decor. Handmade from woven material for soft, underfoot comfort, this flat-pile area rug is perfect for frequently used areas like your living room, hallway or entryway.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
